title: Supported PDFs Registry
description: papers/.supported.json — auto-maintained. Spec 009 FR-022 (Clarification Q2). Auto-include rule: every paper the auditor classifies zero-defects enters the registry; a paper that later fails breaks CI and is removed only by explicit maintainer action or by being fixed.

auditor_version.description: Semver of the PDF auditor that produced this registry.

audited_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC of the audit run that produced this registry version.

paper_id.description: Canonical paper identifier (PROJ-XXX-... or arXiv-id form).

source_arxiv_id.description: If the paper originated from arXiv, its ID (e.g. 2401.12345). Optional for internal-only papers.

pdf_path.description: Repo-relative path to the PDF that passed.

source_path.description: Repo-relative path to the source bundle the deterministic pipeline built from.
